## CLA Required

Thank you for your contribution! Before this pull request can be merged, please sign our Contributor Licence Agreement.

Meshum is dual-licensed (AGPL-3.0 + commercial), so we need the right to relicense your contribution. See [`docs/legal/README.md`](docs/legal/README.md) for the why.

---

**Signing as an individual** — copy and paste this exact line as a new comment on this pull request:

```
I have read the CLA Document and I hereby sign the CLA
```

**Contributing on behalf of a company** — sign the ICLA individually first (so this PR is unblocked), then have an authorised representative sign the [Corporate CLA](docs/legal/ccla.md) via a linked issue.

---

The status check updates automatically within seconds of your comment. Questions? Email **legal@meshum.dev**.

<!-- cla-bot -->
